module.name: kbd
module.description: Renders its body text as a physical keyboard key; block module that renders inline.
module.aiSpec:
Render text as a physical keyboard key (e.g. Enter, Ctrl, Esc). The body (between the directive and `<!-- @end -->`) is the key label. Although it's a block module it renders inline, so it sits within a sentence. Use one per key; for a combo, place several side by side (e.g. Ctrl + C).
Parameters: - `size` (small|medium|large, default medium): key size (font size). - `variant` (default|dark, default default): default = light key on the theme surface; dark = a dark key cap. - `pressed` (true|false, default false): flat "pressed-in" look (no raised bottom edge).
Example: <!-- @kbd size: large, variant: dark --> Enter <!-- @end -->

param.name: variant
param.label: Variant
param.desc: Light key (default) or a dark key cap.

param.name: pressed
param.label: Pressed
param.desc: Flat pressed-in look with no raised bottom edge.

snippet.label: Keyboard Key
snippet.description: A single physical keyboard key. Body = the key label.
